app.title: Jem Pet Scanner
app.tagline: Scan a pet-food barcode to see what's inside

scanner.pointAtBarcode: Point your camera at the barcode
scanner.permissionDeniedBody: This scanner needs permission to use your camera. Please allow camera access in your browser settings and try again.
scanner.noCameraBody: We couldn't find a camera on this device.
scanner.notSecureBody: Camera access only works over HTTPS. Please open this app using a secure (https://) link.
scanner.genericErrorBody: We couldn't start the scanner. Please try again.
